title: No Man's Saplings
description: An addon for Seedy Saplings that supports No Man's Land!
body:
This resource pack changes all of No Man's Land's saplings into seeds, and adds a new sprouting texture for their first stage of growth.


No Man's Land: [https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land)

Seedy Saplings: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/seedy-saplings](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/seedy-saplings)
